mapper.select: SELECT student_id FROM student WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT e.enrollment_id FROM enrollment e JOIN course_section cs ON cs.section_id = e.section_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id WHERE e.student_id = #{studentId} AND e.status = 'ENROLLED' AND sm.is_current = 1 AND c.course_code = #{courseId} FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO review ( enrollment_id, rating_overall, rating_content, rating_workload, rating_professor, difficulty, pros, cons, advice, is_anonymous, created_at ) VALUES ( #{enrollmentId}, #{request.rating}, #{request.rating}, #{request.rating}, #{request.rating},
'MEDIUM'
'HARD'
'EASY'
'MEDIUM'
, #{request.comment}, NULL, NULL, 1, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT review_id FROM review WHERE enrollment_id = #{enrollmentId} ORDER BY created_at DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY
SELECT TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') FROM review WHERE enrollment_id = #{enrollmentId} ORDER BY created_at DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY
